page_content:
# Chapter: General  
## Section 130: Power of other High Courts to make rules as to matters other than procedure
1[A High Court 2[not being a High Court to which section 129 applies] may, with the previous approval of the State Government, make with respect to any matter other than procedure any rule which a High Court 3[for a 4*** State] might under 5[article 227 of the Constitution] make with respect to any such matter for any part of the territories under its jurisdiction which is not included within the limits of a presidency town.]  
---
